description:
Angry IP Scanner is open on the desktop with the default fetcher columns (IP, Ping, Hostname, Ports).

Your task is to add two additional data fetchers to enhance scan results:

1. Open the Fetchers configuration dialog via Tools > Fetchers.
2. From the 'Available fetchers' list on the right, select 'Web Detect' and add it to the 'Selected fetchers' list on the left using the '<' (add) button.
3. Similarly, add 'MAC Vendor' to the selected fetchers list.
4. Click OK to save.

After completing this task, the main scan results table should show six columns: IP, Ping, Hostname, Ports, Web Detect, and MAC Vendor. The additional fetchers will gather HTTP server banners and hardware manufacturer information during scans, providing richer host intelligence.
